description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have four ubuntu-latest jobs: lint, py36-core, py37-core, and py38-core. Each job checks out the repository, sets up a specific Python version (3.6, 3.6, 3.7, or 3.8), installs Tox, and runs Tox with a specific environment. Additionally, py36-core installs Coveralls and uploads coverage reports.
